title: Colourful Wolf Eyes
description: Changes tamed wolfs eye colour(color) to match the collars.
body:
# Colour Wolf Eyes
This pack will make the colour of your pet dog's eyes change with the colour of the collar on your dog.

![All Wolf Eye Colours](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a9c9dbf394255437b42c6241dfdc3ea55162255c.jpeg)
